name: Stromboli
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a cookie sheet with heavy duty aluminum foil and spray with Pam.
2. Place the bread dough on the sheet and roll out into a rectangle.
3. In the center of the dough from top to bottom, layer the ingredients: ham, salami, provolone, pepperoni, and mushrooms.
4. Using a sharp knife, make 4 slits on each side of the bread dough.
5. Crisscross along the top sealing edges with the slits.
6. Place in a warm spot, cover with a kitchen towel, and let rise for 1-3 hours, depending on the temperature.
7. When doubled in size, brush with egg whites (omit if desired) and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until brown.
This recipe freezes well and is often served at parties.
